title: Oaks End
description: End Update Ported from Oaks Frontier
body:
## ⚠️ Disclaimer:
Oaks End is a standalone version of the End Update from Oaks Frontier. It is not compatible with Oak's Frontier and is intended to be played separately.

Oaks End brings a fresh experience to The End, inspired by the enhancements from Oaks Frontier, but in a lightweight, standalone package. This mod is perfect for players who want to enhance The End without overhauling the entire Minecraft experience.

2 End biomes:

- Violet’s Forest - Which adds a purply woodtype
- Wild Ends - Which adds a yellow woodtype
